{{Quote|So if I patch into the C-board here and steal some juice from the circuit, I can maybe extend the range from meta to mega if the systems don't chatter and I don't pulverize the school mainframe.|Ze, Leadership School mercenary squad member|<ref name="Jedi Quest: The School of Fear">''[[Jedi Quest: The School of Fear]]''</ref>}}
'''Ze''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Humanoid/Legends|Humanoid]] member of a squad of young [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] that secretly trained at the elite [[Leadership School]] on [[Andara/Legends|Andara]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Short and plump, with close-set green eyes and two pigtails that hung down his back, he was in charge of the group's communications.

{{Char-stub}}
